Diablos Motorcycle Club.description: Outlaw motorcycle club founded in San Bernardino, California in 1961 by John J. 'Cadillac Jack' Baltas. Has chapters across the United States, with a significant presence in New England. Known for its red-and-black devil insignia and considered a second-tier outlaw motorcycle gang by law enforcement.

descriptions: Bandidos are allied with Diablos in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Bandidos are allied with the Diablos, Mobshitters, and Rock Machine

descriptions: Diablos support Bandidos in Germany.
edges.evidence_quote: The German Bandidos are supported by the Chicanos, Diablos and X-Team.

descriptions: Diablos are an affiliate club of Bandidos in Sweden.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliates of the Bandidos in Sweden include the Chicanos , Diablos and X-Team .

descriptions: The text states the Australian Bandidos are allied with the Diablos.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Bandidos are allied with the Diablos , Mobshitters and Rock Machine

descriptions: Bandidos are allied with Diablos.
edges.evidence_quote: The Australian Bandidos are allied with the Diablos

descriptions: Bandidos merged with Diablos Motorcycle Club to establish a presence in Thailand.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2001, the Bandidos were established in Thailand via a merger with the Diablos Motorcycle Club in Pattaya.

descriptions: Diablos MC is listed as a rival of Cossacks MC.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Diablos MC

descriptions: Diablos asked Bandidos to collect a debt, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: According to the district court, the events originated when the Diablos chapter in Varkaus asked Bandidos' Oulu branch to collect the debt.

descriptions: Diablos is a support club for Bandidos, indicating a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: The Diablos are a support club (called puppet clubs by law enforcement) for the Bandidos.

descriptions: Diablos member Raymond Stone confessed to the 1992 murder of a James Gang MC member, indicating a conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Stone's confession in his involvement in the 1992 murder of rival gang member Mike D'Amato of Wallingford, Connecticut's James Gang MC

descriptions: Diablos were in conflict with the Loners, leading to a biker war.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1995, Satan's Choice made an alliance with the Diablos, a club led by a former Choice member, Frank Lenti, resulting in a biker war in the summer of 1995 with the Loners

descriptions: Diablos and Outlaws engaged in a mass brawl in May 2019, resulting in injuries.
edges.evidence_quote: Diablos were involved in a mass brawl with members of the Outlaws at a bar in Plainville, Connecticut in May 2019, leaving two outlaws injured.

descriptions: Diablos originated from Satanas members.
edges.evidence_quote: Some other Filipino gangs such as the Demonios and Diablos (not the Mexican gang of the same name) claim their roots to Satanas, having originated amongst second generation STS members and younger siblings of individuals who were members of STS; the founders of many other Filipino American gangs were originally members of Satanas.

descriptions: Hells Angels raided Diablos clubhouse, attacking members.
edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Hells Angels and associated clubs raided the Diablos' clubhouse in Melton, Melbourne, on 1 March 2013, according to the Sydney Morning Herald 'bashing' a Diablos member and taking identification details of the Diablos' girlfriends at gunpoint as a threat to stop them reporting the attack to police.

descriptions: Hells Angels in conflict with Diablos.
edges.evidence_quote: while they have been involved in conflicts with the Bandidos , Comancheros , Diablos

descriptions: Diablos is a smaller motorcycle gang allied with Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels are allied with numerous smaller motorcycle gangs – such as the ... Diablos

descriptions: Diablos MC is listed as an ally of Latin Kings.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: American Mafia, Black P. Stones, Bloods, Diablos MC, Four Corner Hustlers, Pagan's MC, People Nation, Sinaloa Cartel, Vice Lords

descriptions: The Latin Kings supply narcotics to the Diablos.
edges.evidence_quote: The Latin Kings maintain links with Mexican drug cartels, and have served as the suppliers of narcotics to motorcycle gangs such as the Pagan's and the Diablos.

descriptions: The Loners fought against the Diablos in 1995.
edges.evidence_quote: The Loners came into conflict with the Diablos in the summer of 1995, who called upon Satan's Choice for aid.

descriptions: Infobox lists Diablos MC as rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Devils Diciples MC, Diablos MC, El Forastero MC, Galloping Goose MC, Hells Angels MC, Highwaymen MC, Iron Horsemen MC, Loners MC, Mongols MC, Pagans MC, Red Devils MC, Sons of Silence MC, Warlocks MC

descriptions: The Diablos are rival biker gangs of the Outlaws.
edges.evidence_quote: Rival biker gangs of the Outlaws include the Devils Diciples, the Diablos

descriptions: Satan's Choice allied with the Diablos against the Loners.
edges.evidence_quote: The Satan's Choice made a firm alliance with the Diablos, led by Loners exile, Frank Lenti.

descriptions: Satan's Choice allied with the Diablos against the Loners.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1995, Satan's Choice made an alliance with the Diablos, a club led by a former Choice member, Frank Lenti, resulting in a biker war in the summer of 1995 with the Loners

descriptions: Sons of Silence and Diablos cooperate as primary meth wholesalers in Vigo County.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sons of Silence, along with the Diablos, are the primary wholesalers of methamphetamine in Vigo County

Playboys (gang).description: American street gang founded in Los Angeles County, California in the mid-1950s, originally a car club. It has multiple cliques and is predominantly Hispanic, with an estimated 6,500 members. The gang is aligned with the Mexican Mafia (La EME) and engages in drug trafficking, assault, robbery, and other criminal activities. It remains active across several U.S. states and Mexico.

descriptions: 18th Street gang listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , 38th Street gang , Venice Shoreline Crips Florencia 13

descriptions: 38th Street gang listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , 38th Street gang , Venice Shoreline Crips Florencia 13

descriptions: Aryan Brotherhood listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: MS-13 Aryan Brotherhood Primera Flats

descriptions: Florencia 13 listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , 38th Street gang , Venice Shoreline Crips Florencia 13

descriptions: MS-13 listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: MS-13 Aryan Brotherhood Primera Flats

descriptions: Playboys align with La EME.
edges.evidence_quote: They align themselves with the prison gang known as La EME or the Mexican Mafia.

descriptions: Primera Flats listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: MS-13 Aryan Brotherhood Primera Flats

descriptions: Venice Shoreline Crips listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , 38th Street gang , Venice Shoreline Crips Florencia 13

descriptions: Vak M is a main group within AFCA.
edges.evidence_quote: The main groups within the AFCA hooligan firm are: - Vak M

Los Lobos.description: Ecuadorian criminal and terrorist organization specializing in drug trafficking and contract killing. Formed in 2020 as a splinter group from Los Choneros after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano. Operates primarily in Latacunga, Riobamba, Cuenca, Machala, and Pastaza province, with over 8,000 members. Involved in prison riots and political violence, including the assassination of presidential candidate Fernando Villavicencio.

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Lobos as an ally of CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Tijuana, Cártel del Golfo, Los Metros, Los Chapitos, Los Viagras, Cártel de Caborca, Fuerza Anti-Unión, Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Lobos patched over to become Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: the Los Lobos ... all abandoned their old patches for the 'Death's Head' patch of the Angels

descriptions: Los Chone Killers list Los Lobos as allies in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Tiguerones, Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Choneros have Los Lobos as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Lagartos, Los Lobos, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers

descriptions: Los Lobos are enemies of Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Lobos is allied with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Kompania Bello, FARC 48th Front, Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Nueva Generación has a drug trafficking relationship with CJNG.
edges.evidence_quote: la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación, como referencia a su relación de narcotráfico con el Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación (CJNG) de México

descriptions: Los Lobos are allied with Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación, Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Los Lobos is allied with FARC 48th Front.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Kompania Bello, FARC 48th Front, Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Los Lobos is allied with Kompania Bello.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Kompania Bello, FARC 48th Front, Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Los Lobos consider Latin Kings as enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Latin Kings

descriptions: Lobos Espejo is a faction of Los Lobos.
edges.evidence_quote: La facción denominada Lobos Espejo liderada por alias Calaca se disputa el control criminal en la provincia frente a Lobos Sao-Box

descriptions: Lobos Sao-Box is a dissident faction of Los Lobos.
edges.evidence_quote: La facción denominada Lobos Espejo liderada por alias Calaca se disputa el control criminal en la provincia frente a Lobos Sao-Box

descriptions: Los Lobos consider Los Chone Killers as enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Latin Kings

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Chone Killers broke away from Los Choneros together.
edges.evidence_quote: broke away in 2020 after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano, along with Los Chone Killers and Los Tiguerones

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Chone Killers united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos ... se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Choneros fought in a prison riot.
edges.evidence_quote: a dispute between Los Lobos and Los Choneros in the Litoral Penitentiary, Guayaquil, led to a riot that killed 123 inmates

descriptions: Los Lobos lists Los Choneros as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Choneros

descriptions: Nueva Generación disputes territory with Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: para disputar el territorio a Los Choneros

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Choneros were in a violent dispute leading to a deadly prison riot.
edges.evidence_quote: El 9 de septiembre de 2023 una disputa entre Los Lobos y Los Choneros en la Penitenciaría del Litoral, Guayaquil, llevó a un motín que dejó 123 reclusos muertos

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Choneros fought in a prison riot in 2021.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 28 de setembro de 2021, uma disputa entre Los Lobos e Los Choneros na Penitenciária do Litoral, Guayaquil, levou a um motim que matou 123 presidiários

descriptions: Los Lobos originated as a splinter group of Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos began as a splinter group of the Los Choneros drug cartel, but broke away in 2020 after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano

descriptions: Los Lobos were formerly part of Los Choneros but later attacked them.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de Los Lobos ... que funcionaban como parte de Los Choneros y protagonizaron la masacre carcelaria

descriptions: Los Lobos were originally a hidden group within Los Choneros, then split off in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos comenzaron como un grupo escondido del cártel de drogas Los Choneros, pero se separaron en 2020 después de la muerte de Jorge Luis Zambrano

descriptions: Los Lobos was originally a dissident group of Los Choneros, splitting in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos começou como um grupo dissidente do cartel de drogas Los Choneros, mas se separou em 2020 após a morte de Jorge Luis Zambrano

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Pipos united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos ... se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

descriptions: Los Lobos consider Los Tiguerones as enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Latin Kings

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Tiguerones broke away from Los Choneros together.
edges.evidence_quote: broke away in 2020 after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano, along with Los Chone Killers and Los Tiguerones

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Tiguerones cooperated in a wave of violence.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos, along with their ally Los Tiguerones, were behind a wave of violence across Ecuador

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Tiguerones united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: El subgrupo de Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos que funcionaban como parte de Los Choneros y protagonizaron la masacre carcelaria, se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Tiguerones were allies in a wave of violence in 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: Em Novembro de 2022, Los Lobos, juntamente com o seu aliado Los Tiguerones, estiveram por trás de uma onda de violência em todo o Equador

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 are rival gangs involved in prison riots.
edges.evidence_quote: Alexander Quesada, the leader of Los Lobos, and Marcelo Anchundia, the leader of rival gang R7, were reportedly behind the riot

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 fought in a prison riot.
edges.evidence_quote: The riot was fought between members of Los Lobos and R7 in an attempt to kill Anchundia

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 were involved in a prison riot together, but R7 is described as a rival gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Se informó que Alexander Quesada, el cabecilla de Los Lobos, y Marcelo Anchundia, el líder de la pandilla rival R7, estuvieron detrás del motín.

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 were involved in a prison riot in 2022, with R7 described as a rival gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 4 de abril de 2022, eclodiram distúrbios na prisão de Turi, Cuenca, que mataram pelo menos 20 presidiários. Alexander Quesada, o líder de Los Lobos, e Marcelo Anchundia, o líder da gangue rival R7, estariam supostamente por trás do motim.

descriptions: Los Lobos and R7 fought in a prison riot in 2022.
edges.evidence_quote: Em 9 de maio de 2022, pelo menos 44 reclusos foram mortos e mais de 100 conseguiram escapar após um motim na prisão de Bellavista, Santo Domingo. O motim foi travado entre membros de Los Lobos e R7 na tentativa de matar Anchundia

descriptions: Los Lobos is allied with Tren de Aragua.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Kompania Bello, FARC 48th Front, Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Los Lobos are allied with Tren de Aragua.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación, Tren de Aragua

descriptions: Los Tiguerones consider Los Lobos enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Tiguerones and Los Lobos are allies in the Nueva Generación alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2021, Los Tiguerones, along with other gangs formerly allied to Los Choneros, including Los Chone Killers, Los Pipos, and Los Lobos, announced the creation of an alliance dubbed Nueva Generación after an alliance with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

descriptions: Los Tiguerones attacked inmates alongside Los Lobos during a prison riot against Los Choneros.
edges.evidence_quote: On 28 September 2021, a dispute between Los Lobos and Los Choneros in the Litoral Penitentiary, Guayaquil, led to a riot that killed 123 inmates... In that riot, members of the Los Tiguerones gang attacked inmates in pavilions 1 and 3 and beheaded five of them.

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Lobos as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Lobos is listed as an ally of Tren de Aragua in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Los Tiguerones (from November 2023) , Los Lobos

Rochester crime family.description: Italian American Mafia crime family based in Rochester, New York, founded in the 1950s by Constenze 'Stanley' Valenti. It operated primarily in the Greater Rochester area, engaging in racketeering, loansharking, gambling, extortion, and other illegal activities. The family split from the Buffalo crime family in the 1970s and was active until around 1993.

descriptions: Bonanno family is allied with Rochester crime family per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Rochester crime family

descriptions: Bonanno family had an association with Rochester crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: The Bonanno family maintained an association with the Rochester crime family.

descriptions: Infobox lists Rochester crime family as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bufalino crime family, Chicago Outfit, Five Families, Los Angeles crime family, Luppino crime family, Papalia crime family, Rochester crime family, Hells Angels MC, Outlaws MC, Schuele Boys

descriptions: Rochester family was represented by the Genovese family on the Commission.
edges.evidence_quote: Rochester crime family (defunct)

descriptions: The Pittsburgh family listed the Rochester family as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bufalino crime family, Chicago Outfit, Cleveland crime family, Detroit Partnership, Gambino crime family, Genovese crime family, Kansas City crime family, Philadelphia crime family, Rochester crime family, Trafficante crime family, Outlaws MC, Pagan's MC

descriptions: Pittsburgh family soldier Valenti took over Rochester family.
edges.evidence_quote: Frank Valenti – a former soldier; in the early 1960s he took over the Rochester family.

descriptions: A Rochester consigliere secretly allied with the Bonanno family.
edges.evidence_quote: his consigliere, Picarreto, had made a secret alliance with members of the Bonanno crime family.

descriptions: Infobox lists Bonanno as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Buffalo crime family, Pittsburgh crime family

descriptions: After the family's dissolution, many members joined the Bonanno family.
edges.evidence_quote: Following his release from prison in July 1996, Thomas Marotta led around half of the remaining former members of the defunct Rochester family in joining the Bonanno family.

descriptions: Rochester split from Buffalo to become independent.
edges.evidence_quote: Frank Valenti told Buffalo crime family boss Stefano 'The Undertaker' Magaddino that Rochester would become an independent family.

descriptions: Infobox lists Buffalo as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Buffalo crime family, and various other gangs in the Rochester area

descriptions: Infobox lists Buffalo as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Buffalo crime family, Pittsburgh crime family

descriptions: Rochester was originally a crew subordinate to the Buffalo crime family.
edges.evidence_quote: Prior to this, Rochester was just a crew which answered to the Magaddino's Buffalo crime family.

descriptions: After the family's dissolution, some members rejoined the Buffalo family.
edges.evidence_quote: Others, including Rene Piccarreto and Angelo Amico, rejoined the Buffalo family.

descriptions: Rochester boss Valenti expected support from the Pittsburgh family.
edges.evidence_quote: Valenti felt that the Pittsburgh family would back him and the Chirico crew up with muscle.

descriptions: Infobox lists Pittsburgh as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bonanno crime family, Buffalo crime family, Pittsburgh crime family

descriptions: Un miembro de Cerco Blanco mató a un fundador de Armenian Power, indicando conflicto.
edges.evidence_quote: Armen 'Silent' Papoyan, uno de los fundadores de la Armenian Power, fue muerto a tiros el 22 de mayo de 2000 por Jose Argueta, miembro de la pandilla latina Cerco Blanco.

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: PFLP developed ties with Japanese Red Army.
edges.evidence_quote: From its foundation, the PFLP sought superpower patrons, early on developing ties with the Soviet Union, the People's Republic of China, and, at various times, with regional powers such as Syria, South Yemen, Libya, North Korea, and Iraq, as well as with left-wing groups around the world, including the FARC and the Japanese Red Army.

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: Japanese Red Army collaborated with a PFLP faction in the Lod Airport massacre.
edges.evidence_quote: On 30 May 1972, 28 passengers were gunned down at Ben Gurion International Airport by members of the Japanese Red Army in collaboration with the PFLP's Waddie Haddad

descriptions: The founder of the Compton Executioners was a former member of the 2000 Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was founded by former 2000 Boys member Andy Toone.

descriptions: Yamahiro-gumi was a faction that broke away to form Ichiwa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Hiroshi Yamamoto (kumichō of the Yamahiro-gumi), broke away from Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: IS-BP is an official affiliate of IS.
edges.evidence_quote: Islamic State – Bengal Province (IS-BP) is active in Bangladesh. The group is an offshoot of the Al-Qaeda affiliated Jamaat-ul-Mujahideen Bangladesh (JMB). It emerged in 2015 and was claimed by IS in 2016.

descriptions: IS-BP is an offshoot of JMB.
edges.evidence_quote: The group is an offshoot of the Al-Qaeda affiliated Jamaat-ul-Mujahideen Bangladesh (JMB).

descriptions: Mazzaferro and Femia were allied in the faida against Aquino-Scali.
edges.evidence_quote: faida che vede contrapposte da una parte gli Aquino-Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia

descriptions: The Mazzaferro and Femia are allied in the faida against Aquino-Scali.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni '70 entrano nel contrabbando delle sigarette e scoppia la faida che vede contrapposte ancora oggi da una parte gli Aquino -Scali e dall'altra i Mazzaferro-Femia .

descriptions: Infobox lists Group of Popular Combatants as an ally of the EPL.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Group of Popular Combatants , PCP (m-l) , FARC

'Ndrina Pane.description: The 'Ndrina Pane is a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from Belcastro, Calabria, Italy. It operates in several towns including Belcastro, Albi, Taverna, Magisano, and Sersale. The group is involved in international drug trafficking, usury, arms trafficking, and money laundering. It is allied with other 'ndrine such as the Grande Aracri and Mannolo of Cutro.

descriptions: Mannolo is allied with Pane-Iazzolino.
edges.evidence_quote: I Mannolo sono una 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese originaria di Cutro e di San Leonardo di Cutro , alleata dei Trapasso-Zoffreo , dei Pane-Iazzolino

descriptions: The text states that Pane-Iazzolino are allies of Farao-Marincola.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , con i Ferrazzo di Mesoraca e con i Farao-Marincola di Cirò .

descriptions: The text states that Pane-Iazzolino are allies of Ferrazzo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , con i Ferrazzo di Mesoraca e con i Farao-Marincola di Cirò .

descriptions: The text states that Pane-Iazzolino are allies of Grande Aracri.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , con i Ferrazzo di Mesoraca e con i Farao-Marincola di Cirò .

descriptions: The text states that Pane-Iazzolino are allies of Mannolo.
edges.evidence_quote: Sarebbero alleati dei Grande Aracri e dei Mannolo di Cutro , con i Ferrazzo di Mesoraca e con i Farao-Marincola di Cirò .

descriptions: Trapasso-Zoffreo killed Sergio Iazzolino, a boss of Pane-Iazzolino, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 marzo 2004, viene ucciso Sergio Iazzolino boss di Sersale in un bar a Steccato di Cutro da parte dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e dei Trovato .

descriptions: Trovato killed Sergio Iazzolino, a boss of Pane-Iazzolino, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 5 marzo 2004, viene ucciso Sergio Iazzolino boss di Sersale in un bar a Steccato di Cutro da parte dei Trapasso-Zoffreo e dei Trovato .

Mara Mao Mao.description: A Salvadoran gang founded in the late 1990s by Carlos Alberto García. It is involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and territorial control, primarily in El Salvador. Smaller than MS-13 or Barrio 18, it maintains a hierarchical structure and engages in violent conflicts with rival gangs. The group remains active as of the present.

descriptions: Mara Mao Mao is in conflict with Barrio 18 over territory and criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Entre sus principales opositores se encuentran: ... - Barrio 18: Otra pandilla de gran presencia en la región, con la cual ha tenido conflictos similares a los sostenidos con la MS-13.

descriptions: Mara Mao Mao is in conflict with MS-13 over territory and criminal activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Entre sus principales opositores se encuentran: - MS-13 (Mara Salvatrucha): Una de las pandillas más grandes de El Salvador y Centroamérica, con la cual mantiene enfrentamientos debido a la disputa de territorios y actividades delictivas.

descriptions: PAGAD killed a leader of Hard Livings.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1996 Rashaad was publicly set alight and killed by the vigilante group PAGAD .

descriptions: UWSA works with ULFA-ATF.
edges.evidence_quote: The United Wa State Army also works with the ULFA-ATF, an Assam resistance group

descriptions: GAS Gang had conflict with TN1.
edges.evidence_quote: GAS also had conflict with ... TN1 (Trust No-One) based in Tulse Hill.

descriptions: AQAP and the Southern Movement are opponents.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: Non-state opponents Southern Movement Southern Transitional Council

descriptions: AQAP attacked STC forces and announced operations against them.
edges.evidence_quote: In response, AQAP launched one of their deadliest attacks in years against Security Belt Forces in September 2022 before announcing their own operation against the STC.

descriptions: Southern Transitional Council was an opponent of Houthis until 2026.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Southern Transitional Council (until 2026)

descriptions: Avengers MC was a Hells Angels prospect club whose clubhouse was attacked.
edges.evidence_quote: In April and May 1996, the clubhouse of a Hells Angels prospect club, Avengers MC, was attacked in Aalborg.

descriptions: Clan Autiero is a faction of Schiavone.
edges.evidence_quote: viene arrestato a Castel Volturno Luigi Autiero, di Gricignano di Aversa , boss del clan Autiero , fazione Schiavone

descriptions: Wheels of Soul members confronted and shot at Real Kings members, resulting in deaths on both sides.
edges.evidence_quote: Five members of the Wheels of Soul Motorcycle Club then entered the shop and told the Real Kings members that they were not supposed to be there. This led to a melee confrontation which erupted into a shootout, leaving the president of the Real Kings MC dead as well as two Wheels of Soul MC members.

'Ndrina Rodà.description: The Rodà are a 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta from Condofuri, Calabria, operating along the Ionian coast. They have branches in Liguria, specifically in Lavagna, allied with the Nucera and Casile families. The group has been involved in public works corruption, including influencing contracts for the Strada statale 106 Jonica. Recent operations have targeted their activities in Liguria.

descriptions: Palamara, Morabito, Bruzzaniti, Talia, Vadalà, Rodà, and Maisano were involved together in conditioning public contracts.
edges.evidence_quote: arrestati diversi presunti affiliati e concorrenti esterni del clan Morabito-Palamara-Bruzzaniti, dei clan Talia e Vadalà di Bova e dei Rodà e Maisano

descriptions: The Rodà are a 'ndrina (sub-unit) of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: I Rodà sono una cosca malavitosa o 'ndrina della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: The Rodà have branches in Lavagna allied with the Casile family.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno diramazioni in Liguria nella Locale di Lavagna con le famiglie alleate Nucera e Casile.

descriptions: The Rodà have branches in Lavagna allied with the Nucera family.
edges.evidence_quote: Hanno diramazioni in Liguria nella Locale di Lavagna con le famiglie alleate Nucera e Casile.

Red Scorpions.description: The Red Scorpions is a Canadian gang based in British Columbia, formed in 2000 by Quang Vinh Thang Le, Konaam Shirzad, and others. They are involved in drug trafficking, arms trafficking, and other criminal activities, operating primarily in the Lower Mainland of Vancouver. The gang is known for its rivalry with the United Nations gang and has been linked to high-profile gang violence. Members are identified by 'RS' tattoos.

descriptions: The infobox lists Red Scorpions as an ally of the 856 Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Red Scorpions

descriptions: The Bacon brothers partnered with the Red Scorpions and later took leadership control.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2006, the brothers partnered with the Red Scorpions gang to help them compete with the United Nations gang.

descriptions: Bacon Brothers were lured to align with Red Scorpions.
edges.evidence_quote: luring the Bacon Brothers away from the increasingly independent and unreliable UN to the more docile and malleable Red Scorpions

descriptions: Jarrod Bacon is identified as a member of both the Red Scorpions and the Bacon Brothers organization.
edges.evidence_quote: File information reveals that you are identified as a member of the Red Scorpions and the Bacon Brothers organization

descriptions: Brothers Keepers are in conflict with the Red Scorpions gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Brothers Keepers are currently in conflict with the United Nations gang as well as the coalition of the Red Scorpions gang and Kang crime family, which is also known as the BIBO ( Blood In Blood Out ) gang.

descriptions: Brothers Keepers split from Red Scorpions; they are rivals in a violent conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the Red Scorpions splitting into the Brothers Keepers and then the remaining Red Scorpions splitting from the Wolfpack

descriptions: Brothers Keepers was founded by former Red Scorpions members.
edges.evidence_quote: Founded by Gavin Grewal with most of its members and leadership formerly aligned with the Red Scorpions.

descriptions: Hells Angels formed alliances with Red Scorpions.
edges.evidence_quote: Additionally, the club has also formed alliances with various street gangs, including the Independent Soldiers, the Red Scorpions, the United Nations and the White Boy Posse, and smaller motorcycle gangs, such as Bacchus, the Gate Keepers and the Red Devils.

descriptions: Hells Angels sold guns to Red Scorpions via their proxy Independent Soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels through their proxy of the Independent Soldiers sought to play off both sides, selling both the UN gang and the Red Scorpions guns and ammunition.

descriptions: The Hells Angels orchestrated the Bacon brothers' takeover to make the Red Scorpions a puppet gang.
edges.evidence_quote: It is believed that the Bacon brothers' take-over of the Red Scorpions was orchestrated by the Hells Angels to reduce the Red Scorpions down to a Hells Angels puppet gang.

descriptions: Independent Soldiers and Red Scorpions were both involved in Hells Angels takeover; later conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Castle Fun Park meeting was a part of a take-over of the Red Scorpions by the Hells Angels with Bacon acting as their proxy.

descriptions: Independent Soldier member was in a vehicle with Red Scorpion members, indicating cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: An Independent Soldier member in James Riach was in a vehicle with known Hells Angels and Red Scorpion gang members that had been targeted by rival gangs...

descriptions: Independent Soldiers, as proxy for Hells Angels, sold guns to Red Scorpions.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels through their proxy of the Independent Soldiers sought to play off both sides, selling both the UN gang and the Red Scorpions guns and ammunition.

descriptions: The Bacon brothers were members of the Red Scorpions gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Jamie did not resist arrest and was led into a police cruiser wearing his Red Scorpions hoodie and track pants.

edges.target: Blood In, Blood Out gang (Kang Crime Family)
descriptions: The Blood In, Blood Out gang is listed as an ally of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Blood In, Blood Out gang (Kang Crime Family)

descriptions: Brothers Keepers is listed as a rival of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Brothers Keepers (BC, Alberta, Ontario)

descriptions: The Dhak group is listed as a rival of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Dhak group (lower mainland)

descriptions: The Duhre group is listed as a rival of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Duhre group (BC, Alberta, Ontario)

descriptions: The Fob-killers are listed as a rival of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Fob-killers (Alberta)

descriptions: The Hells Angels are listed as rivals of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Hells Angels

descriptions: The Independent Soldiers are listed as rivals of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ... Independent Soldiers (BC, Alberta, Ontario)

descriptions: The Red Scorpions (led by Jamie Bacon) exterminated the Lal gang in the Surrey Six massacre.
edges.evidence_quote: The newly founded Lal gang had been 'exterminated' in its entirety with the Surrey Six massacre.

descriptions: The Sanghera Crime Family is listed as an ally of the Red Scorpions in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Sanghera Crime Family

descriptions: The Red Scorpions and United Nations gang were at war from 2007 to 2009.
edges.evidence_quote: The Lower Mainland was gripped by a gang war from 2007 to 2009 as the Red Scorpions fought the United Nations gang

descriptions: The Red Scorpions have a bitter rivalry with the United Nations gang.
edges.evidence_quote: The Red Scorpions have been involved in an increasing number of well-publicized incidents of gang violence in the Vancouver area, in part due to their bitter rivalry with the United Nations gang.

descriptions: Red Scorpions is listed as a rival of Redd Alert in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: ASAP, Red Scorpions, United Nations (gang), Kang crime family (BIBO gang), White Boy Posse

descriptions: TRG has a rivalry with Red Scorpions in South Philadelphia.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang has a South Philadelphia rivalry with the Red Scorpions , with sporadic shooting.

descriptions: The United Nations engaged in a brawl and subsequent murders with the Red Scorpions.
edges.evidence_quote: On the night of 22 December 2002, members of the UN gang led by James Thiphavong were involved in a bloody brawl with members of the Red Scorpions

descriptions: United Nations fought turf wars against Red Scorpions.
edges.evidence_quote: the group fought a number of turf wars against other gangs, most notably the Red Scorpions.

descriptions: The United Nations and Red Scorpions were engaged in a violent gang war.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2008–2009, a violent gang war was brewing in the Lower Mainland area of B.C., with the UN gang believed to be playing a major role in it as the UN gang fought the Red Scorpions led by the Bacon Brothers.

descriptions: Red Scorpions leader Jonathan Bacon was a co-founder of the Wolfpack.
edges.evidence_quote: The other leaders of the Wolfpack Alliance were Jonathan Bacon of the Red Scorpions

descriptions: Red Scorpions are a component of Wolf Pack.
edges.evidence_quote: Wolf Pack, a gang composed of various factions of the Independent Soldiers, Red Scorpions and Hell's Angels

descriptions: The Wolfpack, Red Scorpions, and Independent Soldiers are all active organized crime groups in British Columbia.
edges.evidence_quote: Lindsey Houghton of CFSEU-BC stated: 'We’ve seen and heard the name Wolfpack over the last year . We’ve heard their name come up in places like Kamloops and Surrey. So they are still very active and groups like the Red Scorpions and Independent Soldiers – these groups are still active and prominent in that world.'

Spanish Gangster Disciples.description: The Spanish Gangster Disciples is an Indigenous Latino American street gang originating in South Chicago, founded by Rudy Rios in the early 1980s. It is an offshoot of the Gangster Disciples and is part of the Folk Nation alliance. The gang is involved in drug trafficking, assault, robbery, and murder, and remains active.

descriptions: Spanish Gangster Disciples are rivals of Latin Counts per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sureños, 12st Players, Almighty Bishops, 4GMz, SVLz, Latin Kings, Two Six, 22Boys, Almighty Ambrose, La Raza, Satan Disciples, Krazy Getdown Boys, Imperial Gangsters, Maniac Latin Disciples, Spanish Gangster Disciples, Insane Deuces, Folk Nation

descriptions: Latin Eagles are rivals of Spanish Gangster Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Spanish Gangster Disciples

descriptions: Latin Eagles warred with Spanish Gangster Disciples (SGD's) in 1995.
edges.evidence_quote: A war involving the Latin Eagles and the Gangster Disciples started in the summer of 1995 as SGD's moved into the hood

descriptions: Maniac Latin Disciples were involved with prison Spanish Gangster Disciples; founding members of SGDN were former MLDs.
edges.evidence_quote: At one point the gang was heavily involved with the prison Spanish Gangster Disciples unity of Latino Folks inside, which is different than the street gang SGDN, whose founding members were former Maniac Latin Disciples.

descriptions: Almighty Ambrose took over SGD territory by 1997.
edges.evidence_quote: the Almighty Ambrose, another well known Folk Nation gang, took over most their former territory at 87th & Houston by 1997.

descriptions: Almighty Ambrose listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation, Latin Kings, Latin Counts, Spanish Cobras, Latin Eagles, Imperial Gangsters, Simon City Royals, Harrison Gents, Almighty Ambrose

descriptions: SGD is an offshoot of Gangster Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: It is an offshoot of the Gangster Disciples.

descriptions: Gangster Two Six is listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: most of Folk Nation, Gangster Disciples, Satan Disciples, Insane Two One Boys Of 21st And Leavitt, Gangster Two Six, Vato Loko Boyz

descriptions: Harrison Gents listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation, Latin Kings, Latin Counts, Spanish Cobras, Latin Eagles, Imperial Gangsters, Simon City Royals, Harrison Gents, Almighty Ambrose

descriptions: SGDs had good relationships with Harrison Gents through drug sales.
edges.evidence_quote: Drug sales created good relationships with all the Folks in the surrounding areas, including the ... Harrison Gents.

descriptions: SGDs under Demon started conflicts with Imperial Gangsters.
edges.evidence_quote: Demon ... had already started conflicts with the Maniac Latin Disciples and Imperial Gangsters on the streets.

descriptions: Imperial Gangsters listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation, Latin Kings, Latin Counts, Spanish Cobras, Latin Eagles, Imperial Gangsters, Simon City Royals, Harrison Gents, Almighty Ambrose

descriptions: SGDs had good relationships with Imperial Gangsters through drug sales.
edges.evidence_quote: Drug sales created good relationships with all the Folks in the surrounding areas, including the ... Imperial Gangsters.

descriptions: SGDs and Insane Two One Boys became friends through incarceration.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 80s, members of the SGDs were incarcerated with members of the Insane Two One Boys, notably a Two One elder named Pepe, this brought a friendship with the two organizations that carried out to the streets.

descriptions: SGDs feuded with Latin Counts.
edges.evidence_quote: Specifically due to constant feuding with local area gangs such as the Latin Counts and Latin Dragons.

descriptions: Latin Counts listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation, Latin Kings, Latin Counts, Spanish Cobras, Latin Eagles, Imperial Gangsters, Simon City Royals, Harrison Gents, Almighty Ambrose

descriptions: SGDs feuded with Latin Dragons.
edges.evidence_quote: Specifically due to constant feuding with local area gangs such as the Latin Counts and Latin Dragons.

descriptions: SGDs under Demon waged war against Latin Eagles, former allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Demon also managed to wage a bloody war against the Latin Eagles street gang, one of the Spanish Gangster Disciples closest allies at one time.

descriptions: Latin Eagles listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation, Latin Kings, Latin Counts, Spanish Cobras, Latin Eagles, Imperial Gangsters, Simon City Royals, Harrison Gents, Almighty Ambrose

descriptions: SGDs had good relationships with Latin Eagles through drug sales.
edges.evidence_quote: Drug sales created good relationships with all the Folks in the surrounding areas, including the ... Latin Eagles.

descriptions: Latin Kings listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation, Latin Kings, Latin Counts, Spanish Cobras, Latin Eagles, Imperial Gangsters, Simon City Royals, Harrison Gents, Almighty Ambrose

descriptions: Latin Kings bought marijuana from SGDs.
edges.evidence_quote: In fact it was not strange to see even Latin Kings gang members come through to buy large quantities of marijuana to fund their own operations.

descriptions: Founder Rudy Rios was a former member of Latin Scorpions.
edges.evidence_quote: The gang was founded by Rudy Rios, who was a former member of the Latin Scorpions street gang.

descriptions: SGDs under Demon encroached on MLD territory, causing conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Demon attempted to start a 'set' on West Hirsch Street, which was a MLD stronghold.

descriptions: Founder Rudy Rios was a former member of Maniac Latin Disciples.
edges.evidence_quote: Rudy Rios, who was a former member of the Latin Scorpions (Maniac Latin Disciples) street gang.

descriptions: P.R. Stones were the only enemy of Northside SGDs.
edges.evidence_quote: At this time the only true enemy of the Northside SGDs were the P.R. Stones street gang.

descriptions: Satan Disciples are listed as allies in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: most of Folk Nation, Gangster Disciples, Satan Disciples, Insane Two One Boys Of 21st And Leavitt, Gangster Two Six, Vato Loko Boyz

edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation, Latin Kings, Latin Counts, Spanish Cobras, Latin Eagles, Imperial Gangsters, Simon City Royals, Harrison Gents, Almighty Ambrose

edges.evidence_quote: Drug sales created good relationships with all the Folks in the surrounding areas, including the Simon City Royals.

descriptions: Spanish Cobras listed as rival in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: People Nation, Latin Kings, Latin Counts, Spanish Cobras, Latin Eagles, Imperial Gangsters, Simon City Royals, Harrison Gents, Almighty Ambrose

descriptions: SGDs had good relationships with Spanish Cobras through drug sales.
edges.evidence_quote: Drug sales created good relationships with all the Folks in the surrounding areas, including the ... Spanish Cobras.

descriptions: Vato Loko Boyz is listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: most of Folk Nation, Gangster Disciples, Satan Disciples, Insane Two One Boys Of 21st And Leavitt, Gangster Two Six, Vato Loko Boyz

Tijuana Cartel.description: Mexican drug trafficking organization based in Tijuana, Baja California, founded in 1989 by the Arellano Félix brothers after the fragmentation of the Guadalajara Cartel. It was one of the largest and most violent cartels in Mexico during the 1980s and 1990s, but has been weakened by arrests and deaths of its leaders. Since 2014, it has allied with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, effectively merging into the CTNG.

descriptions: Barrio 18 is allied with the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Cártel de Tijuana

descriptions: The Tijuana Cartel is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Los Mazatlecos, Los Zetas, Juarez Cartel, Independent Cartel of Acapulco, Knights Templar Cartel, Barrio Azteca, Tijuana Cartel, La Línea

descriptions: Cártel de Tijuana is listed as an ally of Cartel de Cali.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Cártel de Tijuana

descriptions: The Cartel del Norte del Valle was allied with the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Tijuana

descriptions: Colima Cartel considered Tijuana Cartel an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Cártel de Tijuana , Cártel de Juárez

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel is listed as a rival of CJNG in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Santa Rosa de Lima Cartel , Los Viagras , Cárteles Unidos , Autodefensas , Nueva Plaza Cartel , Knights Templar Cartel , La Familia Michoacana , Cártel del Noreste , La Unión Tepito , Los Zetas , Zetas Vieja Escuela , Barrio Azteca (current status unknown) , Los Correa , Cartel del Abuelo , Grupo Sombra , Gente Nueva , La Nueva Familia Michoacana

descriptions: CJNG formed an alliance with the Tijuana Cartel in 2017.
edges.evidence_quote: En 2017, pactó una alianza con el Cártel de Tijuana

descriptions: CJNG formed an alliance with the Tijuana Cartel, which effectively became a merger.
edges.evidence_quote: Desde el año 2014, el Cártel Jalisco Nueva Generación estableció una alianza con el Cártel de Tijuana, también conocido como Cártel de los Arellano Félix, la cual en la práctica pasó a ser una fusión, buscando recuperar el control de la ruta a Estados Unidos por Tijuana, Baja California, controlada por el Cártel de Sinaloa, lo que ha generado inseguridad en esta ciudad fronteriza, que contabilizó ese año más de 500 muertos por la guerra entre las dos organizaciones.

descriptions: CJNG allied with Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Despite alliances with the weakened Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: CTNG is the fusion of CJNG and Tijuana Cartel, serving as CJNG's base in Baja California.
edges.evidence_quote: Esta fusión se conoce como el Cártel de Tijuana Nueva Generación (CTNG), siendo la sede del CJNG en esa parte del país.

descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel de Tijuana as an ally of Cártel de Guadalajara.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Cártel de Tijuana

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel started as a branch of Guadalajara Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Multiple modern present day drug cartels (or their remnants) such as the Tijuana , Juárez and Sinaloa cartels originally started out as branches or "plazas" of the Guadalajara Cartel before its eventual disintegration.

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel is listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel allied with a group that betrayed the Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Chachos... had decided to betray the Gulf Cartel and switch his alliance with the Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: After the alliance ended, Gulf Cartel ordered Los Zetas to attack Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Cárdenas ordered Los Zetas to Baja California to wipe out the Tijuana Cartel.

descriptions: Infobox lists Cártel de Tijuana as an enemy of CDG.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Cártel de Tijuana

descriptions: Gulf Cartel leader Osiel Cárdenas formed an alliance with Tijuana Cartel leader while in prison.
edges.evidence_quote: Reports from the PGR and El Universal state that while in prison, Cárdenas and Benjamín Arellano Félix, from the Tijuana Cartel, formed an alliance.

descriptions: Gulf Cartel and Tijuana Cartel formed an alliance that later dissolved after a dispute.
edges.evidence_quote: While in prison, Cárdenas and Arellano formed an alliance to defend themselves from the Sinaloa and Juarez Cartels... After a dispute, however, Cárdenas ordered Arellano beaten, and the Gulf-Tijuana alliance ceased to exist at that point.

descriptions: After Carrillo's death, Tijuana Cartel gunmen killed Juárez Cartel members in a restaurant shooting.
edges.evidence_quote: it was later stated that the perpetrators were gunmen of the Tijuana Cartel.

descriptions: Juárez Cartel and Tijuana Cartel are rivals (despite earlier alliance).
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel, MS-13, Jalisco New Generation Cartel, Gente Nueva, Knights Templar Cartel, Gulf Cartel, La Familia Michoacana, Tijuana Cartel, Mexican government, U.S. government

descriptions: Infobox lists Cartel de Tijuana as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Cartel de Tijuana

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel sicarios attempted to assassinate the leader of the Juárez Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: El 24 de noviembre de 1993, los sicarios del Cártel de Tijuana intentan asesinar a Amado Carrillo Fuentes , alias El Señor de los Cielos y líder del Cártel de Juárez

descriptions: Juárez Cartel, Tijuana Cartel, Los Zetas, and Beltrán-Leyva Cartel are aligned in one faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Since February 2010, the major Mexican cartels have again aligned in two factions, one integrated by the Juárez Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Los Zetas and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel ; the other faction integrated by the Gulf Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Cartel .

descriptions: Juárez Cartel and Tijuana Cartel are loosely allied since March 2010.
edges.evidence_quote: Since March 2010, it is alleged that the major cartels have aligned into two loosely allied factions, one integrated by the Juárez Cartel, the Tijuana Cartel, Los Zetas, and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel

descriptions: Infobox lists Tijuana Cartel as an ally.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is an ally of Tijuana Cartel, assisting in smuggling and violent operations.
edges.evidence_quote: The Logan Heights Gang has been an ally to the Tijuana Cartel (also known as the Arellano-Félix Organization) over the Tijuana smuggling route to the border city of San Diego, California.

descriptions: El Cartel de Tijuana es enemigo de Los Chapitos según el infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Cartel de Tijuana

descriptions: Infobox lists Tijuana Cartel as an enemy of Los Ciclones.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel De Tijuana

descriptions: Los Zetas allied with Tijuana Cartel during the conflict with Gulf Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Zetas allied with the Juárez Cartel, the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel and the Tijuana Cartel.

descriptions: Los Zetas allied with Tijuana Cartel to fight Gulf Cartel and its allies.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Zetas joined forces with the Beltrán Leyva Cartel and the Tijuana Cartel to counterattack the opposing cartels.

descriptions: Los Zetas allied with Tijuana Cartel after the split.
edges.evidence_quote: Consequently, Los Zetas allied with the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel, the Juárez Cartel, and the Tijuana Cartel.

descriptions: Los Zetas allied with the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Following the conflict with the Gulf Cartel, Los Zetas joined forces with the Beltrán Leyva Cartel (who was simultaneously separating from the Sinaloa Cartel) as well as the Juarez Cartel and Tijuana Cartel or Arellano Félix organization, to counteract the alliance of the Gulf Cartel, Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana cartels.

descriptions: Cártel de Tijuana is listed as an enemy of Mara Salvatrucha in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Mara Barrio 18 , Nayib Bukele , Gobierno salvadoreño , Pandilla Mao Mao , Gobierno federal de los Estados Unidos , Cártel de Juárez , Los Negros , Sombra Negra , Cártel de Tijuana , Cártel de los Beltrán Leyva , Bloods , Norteños , Armenian Power , Latin Kings y Los Del Sur

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel is listed as an ally of Mexican Mafia in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Armenian Power , Aryan Brotherhood , Gambino crime family , Hells Angels MC (1960s–1980s) , Independent Soldiers , Los Angeles crime family , Mexikanemi , Mongols MC , MS-13 , Sinaloa Cartel , Sureños , Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel is listed as an ally of Mexican Mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: ... Cártel de Tijuana

descriptions: The Milenio Cartel attempted to expand into Tijuana territory after the fall of the Tijuana Cartel leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: Tras la captura de Benjamín Arellano Félix y la muerte de su hermano Ramón Arellano Félix, del Cártel de Tijuana, así como la detención y extradición de Osiel Cárdenas Guillén, líder del Cártel del Golfo, los Valencia intentaron extender su zona de influencia a Tijuana, Tamaulipas y Nuevo León.

descriptions: Mongols are allied with Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Mexican Mafia – Sureño coalition, the Nuestra Familia – Norteño alliance, the Nazi Lowriders, and the Tijuana Cartel.

descriptions: The Oaxaca Cartel operated at the service of the Tijuana Cartel, indicating a subordinate cooperation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Oaxaca cartel ... was one of the smaller drug cartels operating in Mexico and at the service of the Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: The Oaxaca Cartel joined forces with the Tijuana Cartel in 2003, a cooperative alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The Oaxaca cartel reportedly joined forces with the Tijuana Cartel in 2003

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel and Tijuana Cartel are in a violent conflict over smuggling routes.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sinaloa Cartel has been waging a war against the Tijuana Cartel (Arellano-Félix Organization) over the Tijuana smuggling route to the border city of San Diego, California.

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel is the main rival of Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: such intel was instrumental to the takedown of the Tijuana Cartel, the Sinaloa cartel's main rival

descriptions: Sinaloa took over territories formerly controlled by Tijuana cartel after wars.
edges.evidence_quote: logró apoderarse de varios territorios que dominaban en el pasado los cárteles de ... Tijuana

descriptions: Infobox lists Tijuana cartel as an enemy.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel de Tijuana

descriptions: Sinaloa took over territories previously dominated by Tijuana after wars.
edges.evidence_quote: logró apoderarse de varios territorios que dominaban en el pasado los cárteles de ... Tijuana

descriptions: The Sinaloa Cartel and Tijuana Cartel were at war, with Tijuana killing Sinaloa and Juárez members.
edges.evidence_quote: debido a su rivalidad con el Mayo Zambada (quien se replegó de Tijuana ) y el Chapo, comenzaron a asesinar personas que trabajaran para el cártel de Sinaloa y Juárez, lo que derivo en una guerra entre ambas organizaciones

descriptions: Leaders of the disintegrated Sonora Cartel were incorporated into the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Upon the cartel's disintegration, its leaders were incorporated into the Tijuana Cartel and Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Juárez Cartel, Tijuana Cartel, Los Zetas, and Beltrán-Leyva Cartel are aligned in one faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Since February 2010, the major Mexican cartels have again aligned in two factions, one integrated by the Juárez Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Los Zetas and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel ; the other faction integrated by the Gulf Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Cartel .

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel and BLO formed an anti-Sinaloa alliance headed by Jalisco New Generation Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: along with the Beltrán-Leyva Organization (BLO) to create an anti-Sinaloa alliance

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel and Beltrán-Leyva Organization allied under Jalisco New Generation Cartel against Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the Tijuana Cartel has been reduced to a few cells. In 2016, the organization became known as Cartel Tijuana Nueva Generación (New Generation Tijuana Cartel) and began to align itself under the Jalisco New Generation Cartel , along with the Beltrán-Leyva Organization (BLO) to create an anti-Sinaloa alliance

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel allied with Cali Cartel for cocaine business in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1990s they formed an alliance with the Cali Cartel and Norte del Valle Cartel for the cocaine business.

descriptions: Listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación , Cartel del Norte del Valle , FARC-EP , Cártel de Cali , Unión Tepito , Mafia China

descriptions: Cártel de Cali provided protection to members of Cártel de Tijuana.
edges.evidence_quote: huyeron a Colombia y recibieron protección por parte de miembros del asociado Cártel de Cali

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel allied with Norte del Valle Cartel for cocaine business in the 1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: In the 1990s they formed an alliance with the Cali Cartel and Norte del Valle Cartel for the cocaine business.

descriptions: Listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación , Cartel del Norte del Valle , FARC-EP , Cártel de Cali , Unión Tepito , Mafia China

descriptions: Alliance to cooperate in drug trafficking, forming the Tijuana-Sonora Federation.
edges.evidence_quote: lleva a cabo una alianza con el Cartel de Caborca para unir esfuerzos y trabajar colaborativamente en el tráfico de drogas ilícitas, formando así 'La Federación Tijuana-Sonora'

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel battles Jalisco New Generation Cartel for trafficking influence.
edges.evidence_quote: This alliance has since dwindled as the Tijuana, Jalisco New Generation, and Sinaloa cartels all now battle each other for trafficking influence

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel assassinated a Jalisco Cartel leader, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: the Tijuana Cartel reversed their branding back to Cartel Arellano Félix and arranged the assassination of Cabo 33 the Jalisco Cartel's head of operations in Baja California

descriptions: Alliance and de facto fusion since 2014.
edges.evidence_quote: Desde el año 2014, el Cártel de Tijuana estableció una alianza con el Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación (CJNG), la cual en la práctica pasó a ser una fusión con este último

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel aligned under Jalisco New Generation Cartel in 2016.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2016, the organization became known as Cartel Tijuana Nueva Generación (New Generation Tijuana Cartel) and began to align itself under the Jalisco New Generation Cartel

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel formed an alliance with Jalisco New Generation Cartel, but it disintegrated due to Jalisco's intentions.
edges.evidence_quote: an alliance with the Jalisco New Generation Cartel, which also resulted in the cartel being rebranded as Tijuana Cartel New Generation ... but this alliance disintegrated very quickly when the Jalisco Cartel showed it intended to take the place of the Sinaloa cartel

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel aligned under Jalisco New Generation Cartel as part of an anti-Sinaloa alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: the Tijuana Cartel has been reduced to a few cells. In 2016, the organization became known as Cartel Tijuana Nueva Generación (New Generation Tijuana Cartel) and began to align itself under the Jalisco New Generation Cartel

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel was a successor faction of the Guadalajara Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Miguel Ángel Félix Gallardo, the founder of the Guadalajara Cartel, was arrested in 1989. ... his old organization broke up into three factions: the Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Cártel de Tijuana was a splinter of Cártel de Guadalajara after its fragmentation in 1989.
edges.evidence_quote: La historia y origen del cártel se remonta a la época del Cártel de Guadalajara , el cual en 1989 ... sería fragmentado en dos de los siete grandes cárteles en México. Por un lado ... fundó el Cártel de Sinaloa ... Por otro, los hermanos Arellano Félix fundaron el Cártel de Tijuana

descriptions: Gulf Cartel is a rival of Tijuana Cartel per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel, Gulf Cartel, Juárez Cartel

descriptions: Competition for drug demand and movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Compitió en la demanda y movimiento de droga con los otros grandes cárteles en México, principalmente ... el Cártel del Golfo

descriptions: Listed as enemy in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel del Golfo

descriptions: Cooperation and alliance during their peak.
edges.evidence_quote: el Cártel de Tijuana estrechó lazos con el Cártel del Golfo en su época de mayor esplendor

descriptions: Alliance formed in prison between leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: La alianza de los Arellano Félix con el Cártel del Golfo se gestó en el penal de máxima seguridad del Altiplano

descriptions: Subordination of Tijuana to Golfo after alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: la asociación Tijuana-Golfo de los Arellano Félix con Osiel Cárdenas se transformó tiempo después para convertirse ... en una subordinación del Cártel de Tijuana al Cártel del Golfo

descriptions: Juarez Cartel is a rival of Tijuana Cartel per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel, Gulf Cartel, Juárez Cartel

descriptions: Competition for drug demand and movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Compitió en la demanda y movimiento de droga con los otros grandes cárteles en México, principalmente ... el Cártel de Juárez

descriptions: Rivalry over drug trafficking territories.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cártel de Tijuana ha mantenido cierta rivalidad con dos de las organizaciones de tráfico de drogas ilícitas en México, estos son ... el Cártel de Juárez

descriptions: Attempted murder of Juárez leader Amado Carrillo Fuentes.
edges.evidence_quote: La rivalidad entre ambos cárteles alcanza su punto máximo, en los intentos de homicidio contra Amado Carrillo Fuentes , capo del Cártel de Juárez

descriptions: Listed as enemy in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel de Juárez

descriptions: Listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Cártel de Jalisco Nueva Generación , Cartel del Norte del Valle , FARC-EP , Cártel de Cali , Unión Tepito , Mafia China

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang assisted Tijuana Cartel members in escaping a shootout.
edges.evidence_quote: the Arellano-Félix brothers successfully escaping from the location with the assistance of David Barron Corona , a member of the Logan Heights Gang .

descriptions: Logan Heights Gang is an ally of Tijuana Cartel per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Logan Heights Gang, Russian mafia, Cali Cartel (defunct), Norte del Valle Cartel (defunct), Oaxaca Cartel (defunct)

descriptions: Los Palillos was the armed wing of Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Palillos ("The Toothpicks") was a group operating within Tijuana Cartel, who worked as the armed wing of the Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Juárez Cartel, Tijuana Cartel, Los Zetas, and Beltrán-Leyva Cartel are aligned in one faction.
edges.evidence_quote: Since February 2010, the major Mexican cartels have again aligned in two factions, one integrated by the Juárez Cartel , Tijuana Cartel , Los Zetas and the Beltrán-Leyva Cartel ; the other faction integrated by the Gulf Cartel , Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Cartel .

descriptions: Oaxaca Cartel joined forces with Tijuana Cartel in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: The Oaxaca Cartel reportedly joined forces with the Tijuana Cartel in 2003.

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel has ties with FARC.
edges.evidence_quote: The Tijuana Cartel is believed to have ties with FARC, a Colombia guerrilla group

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel incursion into Tijuana territory in 2006, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: since the 2006 Sinaloa Cartel incursion into Baja California and the fall of the Arellano-Félix brothers, the Tijuana Cartel has been reduced to a few cells.

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel battles Sinaloa Cartel for trafficking influence.
edges.evidence_quote: This alliance has since dwindled as the Tijuana, Jalisco New Generation, and Sinaloa cartels all now battle each other for trafficking influence

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel engages Sinaloa Cartel for control of Tijuana plaza.
edges.evidence_quote: the Tijuana Cartel has further engaged the Sinaloa Cartel for control of Tijuana plaza

descriptions: Gun battle between Tijuana and Sinaloa cartels in 2008.
edges.evidence_quote: Fourteen Mexican drug gang members were killed ... in a gun battle in Tijuana ... that was one of the bloodiest shootouts in the narco-war between the Tijuana Cartel and the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel is a rival of Tijuana Cartel per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Sinaloa Cartel, Gulf Cartel, Juárez Cartel

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel took over territory and routes from the weakened Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: the Sinaloa Cartel outweighed the falling Arellano-Felix Organization and gained control of the Tijuana/ San Diego route.

descriptions: Competition for drug demand and movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Compitió en la demanda y movimiento de droga con los otros grandes cárteles en México, principalmente el Cártel de Sinaloa

descriptions: Rivalry over drug trafficking territories.
edges.evidence_quote: El Cártel de Tijuana ha mantenido cierta rivalidad con dos de las organizaciones de tráfico de drogas ilícitas en México, estos son el Cártel de Sinaloa

descriptions: Rivalry with assassination attempts on leaders.
edges.evidence_quote: En la rivalidad que han mantenido el Cártel de Tijuana y el Cártel de Sinaloa , destacan los intentos de homicidio contra los capos de ambas organizaciones

descriptions: Shootout at Guadalajara airport between the two cartels.
edges.evidence_quote: el 24 de mayo de 1993, el Cártel de Tijuana sostiene un enfrentamiento en el estacionamiento del Aeropuerto Internacional de Guadalajara contra el Cártel de Sinaloa

descriptions: Listed as enemy in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: ... Cártel de Sinaloa

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel charges Sinaloa Cartel a toll for trafficking in its territory, indicating a cooperative arrangement.
edges.evidence_quote: the Tijuana cartel charges a toll ("piso") on the Sinaloa cartel for trafficking drugs in their territory

descriptions: Sinaloa Cartel faction attempted to form an alliance with Tijuana Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: emissaries from the Los Chapitos faction of the Sinaloa Cartel had been seen in Tijuana attempting to form an alliance with the now resurgent Tijuana Cartel

descriptions: Tijuana Cartel formed a truce and sought merger with Sinaloa Cartel in 2011.
edges.evidence_quote: captured cartel lieutenant Francisco Sillas Rocha had confessed that the Tijuana Cartel and the Sinaloa Cartel had formed a truce and that the Tijuana Cartel was seeking to merge with the Sinaloa Cartel.

descriptions: Possible truce or agreement between Tijuana and Sinaloa cartels for peace.
edges.evidence_quote: The relative peace in the city of Tijuana in 2010–2012 has raised speculations of a possible agreement between the Tijuana Cartel and the Sinaloa Cartel to maintain peace

descriptions: The Nuova Camorra Speciale threatened the Vesuvian Camorra of Fabbrocino and Orefice.
edges.evidence_quote: insidia la camorra vesuviana di Fabbrocino e Orefice

Yellow Henry Gang.description: The Yellow Henry Gang was a 19th-century New Orleans street gang active during the early 1870s and late 1880s. Originally led by Turpo, it was taken over by "Yellow" Henry Stewart after Turpo's arrest in 1877. The gang engaged in burglaries, armed robberies, and extortions, attracting many prominent criminals. It disbanded after leader Henry died in prison in 1886 and briefly reformed in 1888 before final dissolution in 1892.

descriptions: Arena is allied with Oliverio against Nicoscia.
edges.evidence_quote: Arena , alleati con la 'ndrina Oliverio di Belvedere di Spinello nella faida contropposta ai Nicoscia .

descriptions: Dragone and Oliverio were in a feud in 1972.
edges.evidence_quote: A Cutro oltre ai Dragone vi erano gli Oliverio che tentavano di prendere il monopolio criminale della città fino allo scoppio di una faida nel 1972 che portò all'omicidio di: Francesco Dragone, Antonio Spagnolo, Vittorio Colacino e Gaetano, Domenico e Salvatore Oliverio.

descriptions: Both groups were linked to the IronMarch forum.
edges.evidence_quote: the Neo-fascist and Neo-Nazi web forum IronMarch.org, which, prior to its shutdown in 2017, had been linked to several acts of Neo-Nazi terrorism and violent militant groups such as the Nordic Resistance Movement

descriptions: AWDSS formed from former NRM members after NRM was banned.
edges.evidence_quote: Atomwaffen Division Finland "Siitoin Squadron" ( AWDSS ) was formed after the ban of the Nordic Resistance Movement (NRM) in 2019, following members of the underground group embracing accelerationism and occultism.

descriptions: Veren Laki is connected to the Nordic Resistance Movement.
edges.evidence_quote: Veren Laki (Law of Blood), a neo-Nazi combat sports collective connected to the Nordic Resistance Movement.

descriptions: The Garfield Boys were headed by a future Colombo boss, indicating a predecessor or early form.
edges.evidence_quote: Garfield Boys – was an Italian American street gang that operated in South Brooklyn sections of Red Hook and Gowanus. The gang was headed by future Colombo boss Carmine Persico from the 1950s to the early 1970s.
